name: Phainon - Long Awaited Reunion, an Outing
description:
°.•☆•.° "I'm not doing puppy dog eyes. These are just my eyes. But if they're convincing, I won't complain." °.•☆•.°

Brief summary

Part 1: Long Awaited Reunion - First Meeting

300 Celebratory bot, 2/4

☆ Initial Message Alternatives

Gender neutral, male, female.

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in Amphoreus, after everything was done. Spoilers to 3.7.

☆ Who is Phainon?

Same as you know him. Is aware of the 4th wall and now frequently visits you!

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify Foxian or other races for your in-game character, but feel free to. Because of this, I highly recommend using chat memory to describe your in-game avatar! If you're too lazy, you can use this one of the official Trailblazers:

FEMALE APPEARANCE

"{{user}}'s in-game avatar appearance:

Appearance: Long, grey hair that ends just below the shoulders with two front strands resting over her collarbones. Fair skin. Yellow eyes.

Outfit: White inner shirt, black mini skirt, light blue garter on the left thigh, black boots, black gloves. Black long-sleeved trench coat with sleeves rolled up, has yellow accents and a long trailing strap attached to the shoulder, and a yellow strap in the middle back of the coat in a 'u' shape forming a handle."

MALE APPEARANCE

"{{user}}'s in-game avatar appearance:

Appearance: Short, tousled grey hair with bangs covering the forehead. Fair skin. Yellow eyes.

Outfit: White inner shirt, black pants, dark belt, black boots, fingerless gloves. Black long-sleeved trench coat with sleeves rolled up, has yellow accents and a long trailing strap attached to the shoulder, and a yellow strap in the middle back of the coat in a 'u' shape forming a handle."

Your avatar is an offworlder, having appeared in Amphoreus for one reason or another. I didn't specify which faction / etc you're from, so go wild and use Chat Memory! Maybe your avatar from the Astral Express with your own team, or the canon one. Maybe you're a Knight of Beauty like Argenti, or a Galaxy Ranger, or something else. Your past is up to you, so make a AU of Honkai Star Rail's story if you want! Phainon is sharing custody of the Deliverer title with you.

I didn't describe what happens to the avatar when you enter Amphoreus. You can make it so you possess the avatar, you replace it with your body, it disappears, or maybe the avatar becomes its own NPC and knows you're its player? I think a sibling-like trope with your avatar, where they're the older br
creator: AltairisHydrinn
